Theming

Messages

Channels

Servers

Users

Direct Messages

Voice

API Keys

WebSocket

On this page

Servers ​

List Servers ​

GET/api/servers

Returns all servers the authenticated user (or bot) is a member of.

Response 200 OK

json
[
  {
    "id": "123456789",
    "name": "My Server",
    "icon_url": "https://cdn.parley.x86-64.com/uploads/icon.png",
    "owner_id": "111",
    "member_count": 42,
    "created_at": "2026-01-01T00:00:00Z"
  }
]

Get Server ​

GET/api/servers/{serverId}

Response 200 OK — server object.

Create Server ​

POST/api/servers

Request body

json
{
  "name": "My Server",
  "icon_url": "https://example.com/icon.png"
}

Response 201 Created — server object.

Update Server ​

PUT/api/servers/{serverId}

Requires owner permissions.

Request body

json
{
  "name": "New Name",
  "icon_url": "https://example.com/new-icon.png"
}

Response 200 OK — updated server object.

Delete Server ​

DELETE/api/servers/{serverId}

Requires owner. Permanently deletes the server and all its channels and messages.

Response 204 No Content

Members ​

Get Members ​

GET/api/servers/{serverId}/members

Response 200 OK — array of member objects.

Add Bot to Server ​

POST/api/servers/{serverId}/members

Adds a bot user to a server. Requires the caller to be the server owner or have the Administrator permission. This endpoint exists specifically for bot onboarding — regular users join via invite links, not this API.

json
{ "user_id": "<bot-user-id>" }

The bot_user_id is returned when you create a Bot API Key (see API Keys).

Response 200 OK

json
{ "server_id": "987", "user_id": "222", "nickname": "" }

Remove Member ​

DELETE/api/servers/{serverId}/members/{userId}

Response 204 No Content

Leave Server ​

DELETE/api/servers/{serverId}/leave

Response 204 No Content

Kick Member ​

POST/api/servers/{serverId}/members/{userId}/kick

Requires admin/owner permissions. Response 204 No Content

Ban Member ​

POST/api/servers/{serverId}/members/{userId}/ban

Requires admin/owner permissions. Response 204 No Content

Roles ​

Get Roles ​

GET/api/servers/{serverId}/roles

Create Role ​

POST/api/servers/{serverId}/roles

json
{
  "name": "Moderator",
  "color": "#ff0000",
  "permissions": 0
}

Update Role ​

PATCH/api/servers/{serverId}/roles/{roleId}

Delete Role ​

DELETE/api/servers/{serverId}/roles/{roleId}

Assign Role to Member ​

POST/api/servers/{serverId}/members/{userId}/roles

json
{ "role_id": "333" }

Remove Role from Member ​

DELETE/api/servers/{serverId}/members/{userId}/roles/{roleId}

Invites ​

Create Invite ​

POST/api/servers/{serverId}/invites

Response 201 Created

json
{ "code": "abc123", "server_id": "123", "expires_at": null }

Get Invite ​

GET/api/invites/{code}

Returns server info for the invite (no auth required).

Set Vanity URL ​

PUT/api/servers/{serverId}/vanity

Requires owner. Sets a custom invite code slug.

json
{ "code": "my-server" }
